name: Agents' Last Exam
description: Frontier agentic-capability exam across long-horizon tool-use tasks.

name: AGIEval
description: Human standardized exams (SAT/LSAT/Gaokao) repurposed as an LLM benchmark.

name: AI2D
description: Diagram question answering (science-textbook diagrams).

name: Aider Polyglot
description: Real-world multi-language code-editing benchmark used by the Aider tool.

name: AIME
description: American Invitational Mathematics Examination, pass@1.

name: AlpacaEval
description: LLM-judged length-controlled win rate vs a reference model.

name: AMC
description: American Mathematics Competitions problem set.

name: ANLI
description: Adversarial natural-language-inference benchmark.

name: ARC-AGI-1
description: Abstraction-and-reasoning visual puzzle grid tasks, v1.

name: ARC-AGI-2
description: Harder abstraction-and-reasoning puzzle grid tasks, v2.

name: ARC-Challenge
description: Grade-school science questions, challenge split.

name: ARC-Easy
description: Grade-school science questions, easy split.

name: Arena Elo
description: Blind pairwise human votes (arena.ai). The gold standard for conversational preference.

name: Arena-Hard
description: LLM-judged win rate on hard, real-world Arena-style prompts.

name: Arena-Hard v2
description: Second-generation Arena-Hard, harder prompt set.

name: BIG-Bench Hard
description: 23 of the hardest BIG-bench tasks, chain-of-thought.

name: BFCL
description: Berkeley Function-Calling Leaderboard, tool/API call accuracy.

name: BFCL v3
description: Third-generation Berkeley Function-Calling Leaderboard.

name: BIG-bench
description: Broad collaborative benchmark of 200+ diverse reasoning tasks.

name: BigCodeBench
description: Practical, tool-using code generation with complex instructions.

name: BIRD-SQL
description: Text-to-SQL generation over large, real-world databases.

name: BrowseComp
description: Hard-to-find-information web-browsing agent benchmark.

name: C-Eval
description: Comprehensive Chinese-language academic/professional knowledge exam.

name: ChartQA
description: Question answering over charts and graphs.

name: CharXiv
description: Chart understanding drawn from real arXiv papers.

name: CMMLU
description: Chinese-culture-aware multi-subject knowledge benchmark.

name: COCO Captions
description: Zero-shot COCO image-captioning quality (CIDEr).

name: Codeforces
description: Competitive-programming rating estimated from Codeforces-style problems.

name: CyberGym
description: Real-world cybersecurity vulnerability discovery and exploitation tasks.

name: DocVQA
description: Question answering over scanned document images.

name: DROP
description: Discrete reasoning over paragraphs requiring numerical/set operations.

name: DS-1000
description: Realistic data-science coding problems across 7 Python libraries.

name: FACTS Grounding
description: Faithfulness of a model's response to a long provided context document.

name: FIN-bench
description: Finnish-language knowledge and reasoning benchmark suite.

name: Flickr30k
description: Zero-shot image-captioning quality (CIDEr).

name: FrontierMath (Tiers 1-3)
description: Novel unpublished research-level math problems, easier tiers.

name: FrontierMath (Tier 4)
description: FrontierMath hardest tier — IMO/research-adjacent difficulty.

name: GAIA
description: General-assistant tasks requiring reasoning, tool use and web browsing.

name: Gaokao Math
description: China's national college entrance exam, mathematics paper.

name: GDPval
description: Economically valuable real-world professional task completion, wins-or-ties.

name: GPQA Diamond
description: Graduate-level science questions that resist memorization.

name: GQA
description: Compositional visual reasoning question answering.

name: GSM8K
description: Grade-school math word problems, 8-shot pass@1. Saturated at the frontier.

name: HellaSwag
description: Commonsense sentence-completion, adversarially filtered.

name: Humanity's Last Exam
description: 2,500 expert-written frontier questions across 100+ subjects.

name: APIBench (HuggingFace)
description: Zero-shot, no-retriever API-call generation over HuggingFace APIs.

name: HumanEval
description: Hand-written Python programming problems, pass@1. Long-saturated at the frontier.

name: HumanEval FIM
description: Fill-in-the-middle code completion variant of HumanEval.

name: IFBench
description: Extended verifiable instruction-following benchmark.

name: IFEval
description: Verifiable instruction-following (format/length/content constraints).

name: JASTER
description: Japanese-language academic/professional knowledge benchmark suite.

name: KoMT-Bench
description: Korean-language multi-turn conversation quality, judged 1-10.

name: LAMBADA
description: Broad-context last-word prediction requiring long-range coherence.

name: LiveCodeBench
description: Contamination-free competitive programming, rolling problem set.

name: LiveCodeBench Pro
description: Elo-rated variant of LiveCodeBench judged against competitive-programmer ratings.

name: LogicKor
description: Korean-language logical/reasoning chat-quality judge benchmark.

name: MATH-500
description: 500 competition math problems across difficulty levels.

name: MathVision
description: Harder visual math-competition problem set.

name: MathVista
description: Visual mathematical reasoning over charts, diagrams and figures.

name: MBPP
description: Mostly Basic Python Problems, pass@1.

name: MGSM
description: Multilingual grade-school math word problems.

name: MiniF2F (test)
description: Formal (Lean 4) theorem-proving benchmark, test split.

name: MiniF2F (valid)
description: Formal (Lean 4) theorem-proving benchmark, validation split.

name: MMBench
description: Broad multimodal ability benchmark with circular-eval robustness check.

name: MMBench (Chinese)
description: Chinese split of MMBench.

name: MMBench (English)
description: English split of MMBench.

name: MMLU
description: 57-subject multiple-choice knowledge. Largely saturated at the frontier.

name: MMLU: Anatomy
description: Anatomy subject slice of MMLU.

name: MMLU: Clinical Knowledge
description: Clinical-knowledge subject slice of MMLU.

name: MMLU (EU-21 languages)
description: MMLU translated and averaged across 21 official EU languages.

name: MMLU: Medical Genetics
description: Medical-genetics subject slice of MMLU.

name: MMLU-Pro
description: Harder, 10-option MMLU successor with less shortcut-guessing.

name: MMLU-Redux
description: Manually re-annotated, error-corrected subset of MMLU.

name: MMLU (STEM)
description: STEM-subject slice of MMLU.

name: MMMLU
description: Multilingual MMLU across 14 languages.

name: MMMU
description: College-level multimodal understanding across 30 disciplines.

name: MMMU-Pro
description: Harder, vision-only-input variant of MMMU.

name: MT-Bench
description: Multi-turn conversation quality, GPT-4-judged 1-10 scale.

name: OCRBench
description: Text-recognition-in-images benchmark across 5 OCR task types.

name: OK-VQA
description: VQA requiring outside/commonsense knowledge beyond the image.

name: OlympiadBench
description: Olympiad-level bilingual multimodal science/math problems.

name: OmniMath
description: Broad olympiad-level mathematics problem set.

name: OpenAssistant Bench
description: Early open community Elo ranking, GPT-4-judged.

name: OpenBookQA
description: Elementary science QA requiring open-book fact combination.

name: PinchBench
description: Agent productivity benchmark for long-running task completion.

name: PIQA
description: Physical-interaction commonsense QA.

name: PubMedQA
description: Biomedical-literature yes/no/maybe question answering.

name: PutnamBench
description: Formal (Lean 4) proofs of William Lowell Putnam Competition problems.

name: RACE-H
description: High-school-level reading-comprehension multiple choice.

name: Rakuda
description: Japanese-language absolute-quality chat evaluation, GPT-4-judged.

name: RefCOCO
description: Referring-expression visual grounding accuracy.

name: RefCOCO+
description: RefCOCO variant excluding absolute-location expressions.

name: RepoBench
description: Repository-level code auto-completion benchmark.

name: SEED-Bench
description: Broad generative multimodal comprehension benchmark.

name: SimpleQA
description: Short factual questions with a single verifiable answer; notoriously low scores.

name: Social IQa
description: Social/emotional commonsense reasoning about everyday situations.

name: StoryCloze
description: Commonsense story-ending selection.

name: StreamingBench
description: Real-time, live-streaming video comprehension benchmark.

name: SuperGPQA
description: Expanded graduate-level science reasoning across 285 disciplines.

name: SuperGLUE
description: Harder successor to GLUE spanning 8 diverse language-understanding tasks.

name: SWE-bench Verified
description: Resolving real GitHub issues in real repositories, verified subset.

name: SWE-bench Pro
description: Harder, held-out variant of SWE-bench Verified.

name: tau-bench
description: Tool-agent-user interactions in realistic airline/retail domains.

name: APIBench (TensorHub)
description: Zero-shot, no-retriever API-call generation over TensorHub APIs.

name: Terminal-Bench
description: Autonomous shell/terminal task completion in realistic environments.

name: Terminal-Bench 2.0
description: Second-generation Terminal-Bench, harder task suite.

name: TextVQA
description: VQA requiring reading text embedded in images.

name: APIBench (TorchHub)
description: Zero-shot, no-retriever API-call generation over TorchHub APIs.

name: TriviaQA
description: Closed-book trivia question answering.

name: TruthfulQA
description: Questions designed to elicit common human misconceptions.

name: USAMO
description: USA Mathematical Olympiad problem set.

name: Vicuna Bench
description: Early human/LLM-judged Elo ranking on 80 diverse questions.

name: Video-MME
description: Broad video understanding across short/medium/long clips.

name: VQAv2
description: Open-ended visual question answering.

name: WildBench
description: LLM-judged win rate on real, in-the-wild user queries.

name: WinoGrande
description: Large-scale Winograd-schema commonsense pronoun resolution.

name: XWinograd
description: Cross-lingual Winograd-schema commonsense resolution.

name: τ²-Bench Telecom
description: τ²-Bench telecom domain — dual-control tool-agent-user tasks in a simulated telecom support setting; a harder successor to tau-bench, distinct scale.

name: MBPP+
description: EvalPlus-augmented MBPP with extra test cases (stricter than base MBPP).

name: HumanEval+
description: EvalPlus-augmented HumanEval with extra test cases (stricter than base HumanEval).

name: OSWorld-Verified
description: Verified/cleaned subset of OSWorld — real desktop-GUI computer-use tasks scored pass@1.

name: OSWorld
description: Original OSWorld computer-use benchmark (screenshot-only agent configuration) — distinct from the later OSWorld-Verified subset.

name: GDPval-AA
description: Updated/harder economically-valuable-work evaluation (0-2000 scale) — distinct from the original GDPval benchmark.
